title: hoya vitiensis subsp. vitiensis
intro: Hoya vitiensis subsp. vitiensis, also known as the Vitiensis Hoya or Fiji Hoya, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to the islands of Fiji. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hoya vitiensis subsp. vitiensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
